productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Dark Brown Tights
description: CompositionDark brown tights made of 93% nylon and 7% elastane, has an elasticated waistband and is footed Pamper your feet and give everyday looks a sophisticated touch with this pair of dark brown tights from United Colours of Benetton. The nylon/elastane blend ensures that the tights stay snug on your legs and protects you from the winter chill. Team it with a short skirt for a sensual look. Stocking careMachine wash cold in not more than 30 degreesDo not dry clean, tumble dry, bleach or ironLine dry in shade
